symptom: a little cough that lingered after a cold so they got a routine chest film
hook: a round lump in the lung was studded with chunky white flecks like a handful of popcorn turned to stone
whatYouSee: A round lump in the lung full of popcorn made of stone.
whyItMatters: It is a harmless benign tumour but the popcorn pattern helps tell it apart from cancer.
treatment: It is usually just watched and only removed if it grows or causes trouble.
takeaway: A lung nodule with popcorn calcification is a hamartoma.
